name: Dramatic Dual Portrait (B&W)
body:
# Close-up black and white portrait

**Category:** AI & Automation  
**Source:** Awesome ChatGPT Prompts

## Prompt

> Close-up black and white portrait of a man and a woman standing side by side. The man has tousled hair and a rough beard, the woman has softly tousled natural hair. Both tilt their heads slightly upward as dramatic overhead light falls on them. Their eyes remain in shadow, creating a powerful, mysterious, silhouette-like mood with strong contrast. 9:16 composition, intimate dual-portrait framing.

---
[← Back to AI & Automation](README.md) · [Main index](../../README.md)
description_en: A text-to-image prompt describing a high-contrast black-and-white close-up dual portrait with dramatic overhead lighting.
description_zh: 一个文生图提示词，描述高对比度的黑白特写双人肖像，配以戏剧性的顶光。
long_en: It specifies a 9:16 intimate dual-portrait of a man and woman with tousled hair, upward-tilted heads, shadowed eyes, and strong contrast for a mysterious, silhouette-like mood.
long_zh: 它指定 9:16 构图、亲密的男女双人肖像：凌乱发型、微仰头部、眼部隐于阴影、强烈对比，营造神秘的剪影般氛围。
sec_note_en: Image-generation prompt for tools like Midjourney or DALL-E; output quality and fidelity vary by model, and it produces images only.
sec_note_zh: 面向 Midjourney、DALL-E 等工具的图像生成提示词；不同模型的输出质量与还原度各异，且仅生成图像。
